body: This PR adds two utility functions to compute the total momentum stress and fix a NaN that could occur when `h == 0` and the volume change is zero by multiplying by a `false` instead of a zero
title: Utility function to compute total momentum stress + Fix a NaN

body:
This PR changes the convention of the top momentum stresses to be positive upwards (momentum flux slowing the sea ice or accelerating the sea ice in the negative direction).

In this way, the convention is the same as for Oceananigans.
title: Change momentum stress convention
